data.title: Henkel to acquire OLAPLEX for $1.4 billion, a prominent science-led hair care brand in the prestige sector.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the current unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, with a total of 10.7 million individuals in the workforce. Additionally, there has been an increase in COVID-19 cases, with 5,000 new confirmed cases in the past week alone. These rising numbers have prompted concerns about the effectiveness of current containment measures and the impact on the economy.Officials are closely monitoring the situation and considering implementing stricter protocols to curb the spread of the virus. Furthermore, the government has allocated $2.3 billion in funding to support businesses and individuals affected by the pandemic. The upcoming weeks will be crucial in determining the course of action to address these challenges.

data.title: Armaf Brings a Sweet Escape to Cosmoprof with their Delights Collection
data.description: In Bologna, Italy, on March 26, 2026, Armaf introduced the Armaf Delights Collection at Cosmoprof Bologna 2026. This new fragrance collection showcased a vibrant and lighthearted atmosphere, focusing on color, sweetness, and celebrating personal uniqueness. The collection's launch marked a shift towards a more playful and expressive concept in the fragrance industry, capturing attention at the event.

data.title: Navan (NAVN) Stock Jumps 23% After Hours — Here's Why
data.description: Navan Inc. (NASDAQ: NAVN) saw a significant increase of 22.95% in after-hours trading, reaching $11.25, following a 7.52% jump to $9.15 in the regular session. The California-based company released its fourth-quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 results, ending on Jan. 31. In Q4, Navan reported a revenue of $178 million (up from ~$132 million in the prior year), a Gross Booking Volume (GBV) of $2.3 billion (~$1.6 billion in the previous year), and a Non-GAAP gross margin of 72% (up from 68%). Additionally, the Non-GAAP net income improved to $5.2 million from a loss of $33 million in the prior year Q4. Year-over-year, revenue increased by 35%, and GBV by 42%. For the full fiscal year 2026, the company's revenue rose by 31% to $702 million, with Non-GAAP operating income reaching $37 million compared to $25 million in the prior year.
